steps.title: Identify the signal that sets up examples
steps.content: The phrase “in several ways” establishes that the next sentence will provide specific instances or examples of how the station serves the community.

steps.title: Select the transition that introduces examples
steps.content: ”For instance,” introduces concrete examples of how the station serves the community. The other options establish logical relationships (causation, conclusion, opposition) that don't apply. That matches choice A — A is correct.
